creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: zi
Date: Fri Jan 31 23:10:47 2014
New Revision: 342092
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/342092
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r342092/

Log:
  - Add STAGE support
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  - Sort pkg-plist
  
  PR:		ports/185273
  Submitted by:	ohauer@

Modified:
  head/net/daq/Makefile
  head/net/daq/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net/daq/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/daq/Makefile	Fri Jan 31 23:02:59 2014	(r342091)
+++ head/net/daq/Makefile	Fri Jan 31 23:10:47 2014	(r342092)
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	daq
 PORTVERSION=	2.0.1
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/snort/snort \
 		http://mirrors.rit.edu/zi/
@@ -13,8 +14,8 @@ COMMENT=	Data Acquisition abstraction li
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	dnet:${PORTSDIR}/net/libdnet \
-		pcap:${PORTSDIR}/net/libpcap
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libdnet.so:${PORTSDIR}/net/libdnet \
+		libpcap.so:${PORTSDIR}/net/libpcap
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	flex:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/flex
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
@@ -27,5 +28,4 @@ MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 CFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net/daq/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/net/daq/pkg-plist	Fri Jan 31 23:02:59 2014	(r342091)
+++ head/net/daq/pkg-plist	Fri Jan 31 23:10:47 2014	(r342092)
@@ -4,22 +4,22 @@ include/daq_api.h
 include/daq_common.h
 include/sfbpf.h
 include/sfbpf_dlt.h
-lib/libdaq.so.2
-lib/libdaq.so
-lib/libdaq.la
-lib/libdaq_static.la
+lib/daq/daq_dump.la
+lib/daq/daq_dump.so
+lib/daq/daq_ipfw.la
+lib/daq/daq_ipfw.so
+lib/daq/daq_pcap.la
+lib/daq/daq_pcap.so
 lib/libdaq.a
+lib/libdaq.la
+lib/libdaq.so
+lib/libdaq.so.2
 lib/libdaq_static.a
-lib/libsfbpf.so.0
-lib/libsfbpf.so
-lib/libsfbpf.la
-lib/libsfbpf.a
-lib/libdaq_static_modules.la
+lib/libdaq_static.la
 lib/libdaq_static_modules.a
-lib/daq/daq_pcap.so
-lib/daq/daq_pcap.la
-lib/daq/daq_dump.so
-lib/daq/daq_dump.la
-lib/daq/daq_ipfw.so
-lib/daq/daq_ipfw.la
+lib/libdaq_static_modules.la
+lib/libsfbpf.a
+lib/libsfbpf.la
+lib/libsfbpf.so
+lib/libsfbpf.so.0
 @dirrm lib/daq
